name: Red and White Salad
recipeInstructions:
Cranberry layer:
1. In a small bowl, combine the 1/4 cup cold water and 1 envelope gelatin. Let soften for 5 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, blend together 4 cups (two 16-ounce cans) of cranberry sauce, crushed pineapple, and walnuts.
3. Dissolve the gelatin in very hot water. Stir into the cranberry mixture and pour into a lightly oiled 3-quart mold (do not use olive oil). Chill until slightly set.
Chicken layer:
4. Prepare gelatin for the second layer as in step 1.
5. In a bowl, blend mayonnaise, evaporated milk, salt, and pepper with dissolved gelatin.
6. Fold in chicken, celery, and parsley.
7. Turn onto the cranberry layer when slightly set (consistency of beaten egg whites). Refrigerate until firm. Unmold onto serving platter, garnished with fresh lettuce if desired. Serve with extra mayonnaise.
